label.fr: M7. Tableau de bord du secteur national de la sante (NHSS)

resultsObjects.description: Scorecard indicators at zone level (long format)
Scorecard indicators at state level (long format)
Scorecard indicators at LGA level (long format)

summary.en: Ratio of 4th ANC visits to 1st ANC visits before 20 weeks gestation. Measures ANC continuity among early attendees.
summary.fr: Ratio des 4e visites CPN aux 1eres visites CPN avant 20 semaines de grossesse.

summary.en: Ratio of 4th ANC visits to all 1st ANC visits. Measures ANC continuity (dropout between 1st and 4th visit).
summary.fr: Ratio des 4e visites CPN a toutes les 1eres visites CPN.

label.fr: Taux d'accouchement assiste par du personnel qualifie

summary.en: Deliveries attended by skilled birth attendants as percentage of all reported deliveries. Institutional denominator.
summary.fr: Accouchements assistes par du personnel qualifie en pourcentage de tous les accouchements declares.

label.en: New FP acceptors per women of reproductive age
label.fr: Nouvelles utilisatrices de PF par femmes en age de procreer

summary.en: New family planning acceptors as percentage of estimated women of reproductive age (15-49). Denominator: total_population x 5.5%.
summary.fr: Nouvelles utilisatrices de planification familiale en pourcentage des femmes en age de procreer estimees.

label.fr: Traitement ACT pour paludisme non complique

summary.en: Persons with confirmed uncomplicated malaria treated with ACT as percentage of confirmed uncomplicated malaria cases (or malaria positive if uncomplicated not available).
summary.fr: Personnes atteintes de paludisme non complique confirme traitees par ACT.

summary.en: Penta3 doses given as percentage of estimated quarterly births. Denominator: total_population x 1%.
summary.fr: Doses de Penta3 administrees en pourcentage des naissances trimestrielles estimees.

summary.en: Children fully immunized as percentage of estimated quarterly births. Denominator: total_population x 1%.
summary.fr: Enfants completement vaccines en pourcentage des naissances trimestrielles estimees.

summary.en: New suspected hypertension cases per 10,000 person-years. Denominator: total_population x 0.25 (quarterly).
summary.fr: Nouveaux cas suspects d'hypertension pour 10 000 personnes-annees.

label.fr: Nouveaux cas de diabete pour 10 000 personnes-annees

summary.en: New suspected diabetes cases per 10,000 person-years. Denominator: total_population x 0.25 (quarterly).
summary.fr: Nouveaux cas suspects de diabete pour 10 000 personnes-annees.

summary.en: Percentage of expected facility reports that were submitted on time AND contained data (positive value in General Attendance, OPD, or Penta3). Derived at facility-month level then aggregated.
summary.fr: Pourcentage de rapports attendus soumis a temps ET contenant des donnees. Derive au niveau etablissement-mois puis agrege.
